11.content:

info.brief_description: Sexually enchanted water takes over a city
info.description:
In a small house outside of a large city, a group of teenage witches perform a sexual ceremony over a cauldron. The cauldron sat on top of a drawn pentagram drawn out of chalk and let candles at each corner. Thinking they were going to summon a sexual nymph to satisfy their lust-filled desires, they follow the ritual and all four of them sit around the cauldron and masturbate to orgasm. As they all came, they collected their sexual fluids in a glass and then poured them in the cauldron while chanting.

Unfortunately, being novice witches, they didn’t realize that part of the spell was missing from their spellbook and nothing seemed to happen after their two-hour-long endeavor. Disappointed, they cleaned up the basement and dumped the cauldron down the drain in the closest bathtub. Unknown to them, they just sexually charged the entire water supply and were about to cause all kinds of mayhem all over the city.

Rules

The only real limit here is your imagination. What does the water do when it comes in contact with people or things? Does it bring inanimate objects to life (clothes, sex toys, random household objects) to mess with their owners? Does it bring certain body parts to life? Does it make those who drink it physically unable to resist their sexual urges? Does the water itself somehow manifest itself in ways that it can stimulate or have its way with those it comes in contact with?

These are just a few ideas but you are in no way limited to these things if you think of something else entirely. Of course, follow site rules and anything sexual involving minors under 18 is not allowed.

Have fun!!!
